narrative:
Marion Twp township has 2,534 registered voters, with 43.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.9 percentage points.
